nasb.text: But if I say to the youth, ‘Behold, the arrows are beyond you,’ go, for the Lord has sent you away.

esv.text: But if I say to the youth, ‘Look, the arrows are beyond you,’ then go, for the Lord has sent you away.

cnv.text: 如果我對僕人說：‘看哪！箭在你的前面。’你就要離去，因為是耶和華打發你去的。

ccb.text: 但如果我对少年说，‘箭就在你前面。’你就要离开，因为是耶和华要你离开。
